results.title: Minimalist Mac Coding Setup Uses Workflows with Yabai
results.description: Edmund Yong shares his minimalist MacBook setup, designed to create a focused and efficient coding environment. At the heart of this setup is the MacBook Pro 16-inch M3 Max, chosen for its balance of performance and display size, ideal for demanding tasks like compiling large codebases or managing virtual machines. To complement the hardware, Yong [...] The post Minimalist Mac Coding Setup Uses Workflows with Yabai appeared first on Geeky Gadgets .
